reviews.review_description: I just didn't get very far because I don't like talking into the microphone. but this is probably the best (Free) spanish language learning in VR, or at least for GO.
This app won't work on my Galaxy S9, even though it worked fine on my S7. Is this a known issue?  Sadly cannot use... Uninstalled it.
Dosen't even open. I see others have the same issue.  The developer dosen't seem to give a sh*t

I love the game! It is really fun and informational but the microphone can not keep up with what you are saying. I can't get past helping in the kitchen and if you do not get it right so many times in a row they make you start all over. I got annoyed and quit playing. If they can fix this issue I would continue playing.

Yes. I am using headphones. For the most part it picks up what I'm saying but it is delayed. So by the time it picks up what I'm saying the game has already progressed to the next action.

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review! If I could ask a question, are you using headphones with an inline mic? If not, I would highly recommend that.  It makes a huge difference in how well the voice recognition works.

reviews.review_title: S8 plus used to work now does not
reviews.review_description: This was perfect for learning a little bit of Spanish for holidays they updated it now it just goes to black screen what's worse you have to take it out of gear VR reset your phone then replace it to get your phone working again
This app makes learning Spanish easy and fun! The app is a little storage heavy, but it's not a big deal.
Not working. I have used this before and it did work but not today

Lot of potential, but buggy. Used on Oculus Go.  Instructions tell you tap on headphones to see dictionary but you need to use wand. Doesn’t save where you left off when you quit even though says it saved. So you have to start over.  Wand stops working even though it was working previously to  up objects.
